## What this PR does

One sentence. What changed and why.

## Linked issue

Closes #XXX (required — we don't review PRs without a linked issue except for typo / link fixes)

## What I tested

- [ ] I ran the relevant test suite locally (`cargo test` / `pnpm test` / `pytest`)
- [ ] I added a regression test for any bug fix in this PR
- [ ] I checked that CI passes on this branch
- [ ] For pattern changes: I added both a positive test (the attack triggers detection) AND a negative test (similar-looking-but-safe code does NOT trigger detection)

## Disclosure

- [ ] I used an AI assistant (Claude / GPT / Copilot / Cursor) to draft this change
  - If yes: I reviewed every line of the diff myself before submitting
